overall.description: First-person walking through a game engine city (resembling GTA V) at night, transitioning from a residential sidewalk to an urban intersection and open plaza. Wet pavement reflects street lights and building illumination, creating atmospheric blue-toned lighting throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with tree canopy and brick walls

events.description: passing the for sale sign which temporarily blocks the right side of view
approaching street intersection as sidewalk opens up to wider street view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the residential sidewalk, passing trees and wall fences

entered.detail: green and yellow real estate sign with phone number mounted on white posts
tan brick wall with red trim running along the right side of the sidewalk
3-story residential building with illuminated windows and modern facade
line of mature trees with dense canopies lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a quiet residential sidewalk at night, passing a green For Sale sign and mature trees. The wet concrete reflects street lights while a low apartment building with illuminated windows stands to the left and a brick wall runs along the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with stop sign

events.description: black sedan with brake lights on waits at the intersection on the left
crossing from sidewalk onto the wet asphalt street at the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, pausing near the stop sign, then crossing the street toward the open plaza

notable_agents.action: black sedan stopped at the intersection with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign mounted on metal pole at street corner
tall modern apartment building with vertical blue accent lighting on balconies
wooden utility pole with street light fixture illuminating the intersection

segments.scene_description: Approaching a street intersection marked by a red stop sign, with a tall residential tower rising on the left. A black sedan waits at the corner as the camera crosses the wet asphalt street, transitioning from the enclosed sidewalk to a more open urban plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with high-rise residential towers

events.description: entering open plaza area with expansive wet pavement reflecting building lights
vehicle headlights visible approaching in the distance through the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza area, observing the tall surrounding buildings and wet reflective streets

entered.detail: dominant tall white residential tower with hundreds of illuminated windows
secondary high-rise building with grid-patterned window lighting
yellow diamond-shaped traffic signs mounted on poles

segments.scene_description: Moving through an expansive open urban plaza surrounded by towering residential high-rises with countless illuminated windows. The wet pavement creates mirror-like reflections of the buildings and street lights, while the camera navigates the wide intersection area with traffic signs visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a quiet residential sidewalk into a vast, illuminated urban plaza at night. It begins by passing a green For Sale sign and mature trees, moving along wet concrete that reflects the glow of a low apartment building and a bordering brick wall. As the camera approaches a street intersection, the enclosed feeling of the sidewalk gives way to a more open vista, passing a red stop sign and a waiting black sedan while a tall residential tower rises on the left. The scene then expands as the camera crosses the wet asphalt, transitioning into an expansive plaza surrounded by towering high-rises with countless illuminated windows. Finally, the movement continues across the wide intersection, where the wet pavement creates mirror-like reflections of the surrounding architecture and street lights.
